channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SCTL] Shree Ganesh Bio Tech Acquires 1,34,58,166 Shares of Suncare Traders Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Shree Ganesh Bio Tech (India) Limited. The company has acquired 1,34,58,166 shares of Suncare Traders Ltd, which is 5.28% of the total diluted share/voting capital of the target company. The acquisition was made through a mode other than open market, public issue, rights issue, preferential allotment, or inter-se transfer. The securities bought do not have any specific redemption time and cannot be converted into equity shares. The acquisition was made on 22.03.2026.

  • Shree Ganesh Bio Tech acquires 1,34,58,166 shares of Suncare Traders Ltd
  • The acquisition is 5.28% of the total diluted share/voting capital of Suncare Traders Ltd
  • The acquisition was made on 22.03.2026
  • The securities bought do not have any specific redemption time and cannot be converted into equity shares
  • The acquisition was made through a mode other than open market, public issue, rights issue, preferential allotment, or inter-se transfer

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Suncare Traders Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [KIZI] Kizi Apparels Ltd Allots 23 Lakh Convertible Warrants to Promoter/Promoter Group and Public Category
item.description:
Kizi Apparels Ltd has allotted 23,04,000 (Twenty-three lakh four thousand) Convertible Warrants to the allottees belonging to the Promoter/Promoter Group and Public Category through a preferential issue. Each Warrant entitles the holder to convert it into one fully paid-up Equity Share of face value of Rs. 10.00/- within a period of 18 months from the date of allotment. The price of each Warrant is Rs. 15.50, which includes a premium of Rs. 5.50. The allottees include Abhishek Nathani, Kiran Nathani, Raj Kumar Nathani, Suchitra Nathani, Surinder Goel, Surinder Goel HUF, Umang Kamlesh Vora, Paresh J Patel, Parshva Alloys Private Limited, and Evolvion Advisory Private Limited.

  • Kizi Apparels Ltd allots 23,04,000 Convertible Warrants
  • Warrants allotted to Promoter/Promoter Group and Public Category
  • Each Warrant convertible into one Equity Share
  • 18-month conversion period
  • Warrant price set at Rs. 15.50 with a premium of Rs. 5.50

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kizi Apparels Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [TIINDIA] Stock Exchanges Grant No-objection for Reclassification of Tube Investments of India Ltd's Promoter Group
item.description:
Tube Investments of India Ltd has received a no-objection letter from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) and BSE Limited (BSE) for the reclassification of Algavista Greentech Private Limited from 'Promoter and Promoter Group Category' to 'Public Category'. This decision was made in accordance with Regulation 31A of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company is required to ensure compliance with subsequent relevant disclosures of material events related to this reclassification.

  • Tube Investments of India Ltd receives no-objection for reclassification of promoter group
  • Algavista Greentech Private Limited reclassified from 'Promoter and Promoter Group Category' to 'Public Category'
  • Reclassification in accordance with Regulation 31A of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
  • Company required to ensure compliance with subsequent relevant disclosures of material events related to this reclassification

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tube Investments of India Ltd | Category: Reclassification of Shareholding

item.title: [CENTENKA] Century Enka Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Century Enka Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all Directors, Connected Persons, Designated Persons, and their immediate relatives from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the announcement of the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct to regulate, monitor, and report trades in equity shares and other listed securities by Designated Persons and Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Century Enka Ltd announces trading window closure for FY 2025-2026
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the announcement of financial results
  • Closure in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Applies to Directors, Connected Persons, Designated Persons, and their immediate relatives
  • Aim is to regulate, monitor, and report trades in equity shares and other listed securities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTURY ENKA LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SEALMATIC] Sealmatic India Ltd Closes Trading Window for Connected Persons till 48 hours after March 31, 2026 Audited Financial Results Declaration
item.description:
Sealmatic India Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all Connected Persons/Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, April 01, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the Half year and Year ending 31st March 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of these results will be intimated in due course.

  • Sealmatic India Ltd closes trading window for Connected Persons till 48 hours after March 31, 2026 Audited Financial Results Declaration
  • The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading
  • The trading window will be closed for all Connected Persons/Designated Persons and their immediate relatives
  • The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, April 01, 2026
  • The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of the Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sealmatic India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VISIONCO] Vision Corporation Ltd Closes Trading Window for Q1 2026
item.description:
Vision Corporation Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The closure will be in effect from April 01, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board of Directors' meeting to approve the Audited Financial Results will be informed in due course. Designated persons are advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during this period.

  • Trading window for Q1 2026 closed
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026
  • 48 hours after Audited Financial Results declaration
  • Board of Directors' meeting date to be informed later
  • Designated persons advised not to trade during closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VISION CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DMART] Avenue Supermarts Ltd Opens Two New Stores in Telangana and Andhra Pradesh
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avenue Supermarts Ltd, the company that operates the DMart chain of retail stores, has announced the opening of two new stores at Turkayamjal, Rangareddy (Telangana) and MVP Colony, Visakhapatnam (Andhra Pradesh). This brings the total number of stores to 469.

  • Avenue Supermarts Ltd opens two new stores in Telangana and Andhra Pradesh
  • The new stores are located at Turkayamjal, Rangareddy and MVP Colony, Visakhapatnam
  • This brings the total number of stores to 469
  • The company operates the DMart chain of retail stores

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avenue Supermarts Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SCTL] Siddhi Power Acquires 2.71% Stake in Suncare Traders Ltd
item.description:
Siddhi Power Limited has acquired 2.71% stake in Suncare Traders Limited. The acquisition took place between 05.03.2026 and 24.03.2026. Before the acquisition, Siddhi Power Limited held 5.00% shares in Suncare Traders Limited. Post-acquisition, the holding has reduced to 2.29%. The total equity share capital of Suncare Traders Limited is Rs. 51,00,00,000 divided into 25,50,00,000 shares of Rs. 2/- each.

  • Siddhi Power Limited acquires 2.71% stake in Suncare Traders Limited
  • The acquisition took place between 05.03.2026 and 24.03.2026
  • Before the acquisition, Siddhi Power Limited held 5.00% shares in Suncare Traders Limited
  • Post-acquisition, the holding has reduced to 2.29%
  • The total equity share capital of Suncare Traders Limited is Rs. 51,00,00,000 divided into 25,50,00,000 shares of Rs. 2/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Suncare Traders Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [UGROCAP] Ugro Capital Ltd Approves Allotment of Unlisted Commercial Papers Worth Rs. 25 Crores
item.description:
Ugro Capital Ltd has approved the allotment of unlisted Commercial Papers worth Rs. 25 Crores. The decision was made by the Investment and Borrowing Committee of the Board of Directors on Tuesday, 24th March 2026. The Commercial Papers, with a face value of Rs. 5,00,000 each, will be issued at Rs. 4,98,438 per security, amounting to a total issue value of Rs. 24,92,19,000. The redemption value of these securities will be Rs. 25,00,00,000. The redemption date is set for 06-04-2026, making the tenure of the security 13 days. Yes Bank Limited, Mumbai is the designated Issuing and Paying Agent (IPA) for these securities.

  • Ugro Capital Ltd approves allotment of unlisted Commercial Papers worth Rs. 25 Crores
  • The Commercial Papers will be issued at Rs. 4,98,438 per security
  • The total issue value is Rs. 24,92,19,000
  • The redemption value is Rs. 25,00,00,000
  • Yes Bank Limited, Mumbai is the IPA for these securities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ugro Capital Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [BCPL] BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd. Granted Permission to List Equity Shares on NSE from 27th March 2026
item.description:
BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd. has been permitted to list its 16723638 (nos) of Equity shares at the rate of Rs 10/- (paid-up) per share on the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) platform. The shares, with a face value of Rs. 10/-, will be fully paid up. The permitted securities for trading on the NSE platform will be Equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, with a distinct number range from 1 to 16723638. The market lot is 1, and the shares are pari passu. There are no lock-in details.

  • BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd. permitted to list equity shares on NSE
  • 16723638 (nos) of Equity shares at the rate of Rs 10/- (paid-up) per share
  • Face value Rs. 10/- and fully paid up
  • Market lot is 1 and pari passu
  • No lock-in details

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd | Category: New Launch
